tweets.fullText: Kamino can confirm that it has zero exposure to the Drift protocol compromise. Kamino users, across all products, including Vaults, Markets, and Multiply, are wholly unaffected.
tweets.aiAnalysis:
# Analysis

The tweet performed moderately well (1.6% engagement rate) because it directly addressed a **fear-driven narrative** during an active crisis moment—the reassurance format triggers relief and trust-building in volatile market conditions. However, engagement was capped by the lack of **specificity or newsworthy detail** (no metrics on TVL affected, no technical explanation, no broader market context) and the absence of visual content to break up text-heavy reassurance messaging.

The core narrative about tokenized equities enabling 24/7 borrowing is intellectually interesting but lacks the novelty or shock value that drives viral engagement, as this use case had already been established in the DeFi conversation.
